## What this PR adds / changes

<!-- One or two sentences. Don't restate the diff. -->

## Type
- [ ] New service page (`docs/01-services/`)
- [ ] New pattern (`docs/02-patterns/`)
- [ ] New interview design (`docs/03-interview-designs/`)
- [ ] New reference architecture (`docs/04-reference-architectures/`)
- [ ] Well-Architected pillar (`docs/05-well-architected/`)
- [ ] Correction / update to existing page
- [ ] Tooling / CI / scaffolding

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows the [page template](../CONTRIBUTING.md#page-template).
- [ ] Length within budget (service 600–1200 words / interview 1500–3500 / ref-arch 1000–2500).
- [ ] Diagrams committed: Mermaid inline, or both `.py` source and rendered `.png` for `diagrams` output.
- [ ] Self-checked the [diagram review checklist](../CONTRIBUTING.md#diagram-self-review-checklist).
- [ ] Quantitative claims (latency, throughput, quota, price) verified against current AWS docs, or omitted and linked out.
- [ ] No reproduced AWS docs, no real customer data, no console screenshots.
- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files` passes locally.
- [ ] Commits signed off (`git commit -s`) per [DCO](../CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-sign-off-dco).
